section_1.title: General Provisions
section_1.intro: This Terms of Service (hereinafter — «Agreement») governs the relationship between
section_1.and_user: and the User when using the Services.
section_1.acceptance: Use of the Services constitutes full and unconditional acceptance of the terms of this Agreement.
section_1.capacity: User confirms that they are of legal capacity and have the right to enter into this Agreement.

section_2.title: Definitions
section_2.service: «Services» — website, mobile application, WhatsApp bot and other services provided by the Operator;
section_2.user: «User» — an individual or legal entity using the Services;
section_2.account: «Account» — User's personal account in the Services;
section_2.content: «Content» — any materials posted by the User in the Services (texts, images, files, etc.).

section_3.title: Registration and Account
section_3.registration: Registration of an account is required to use some features of the Services.
section_3.accuracy: User undertakes to provide accurate and up-to-date information during registration.
section_3.credentials: User is responsible for the security of account login credentials.
section_3.unauthorized: User must immediately notify the Operator of any unauthorized access to the account.
section_3.suspension: Operator reserves the right to suspend or delete the account in case of violation of the Agreement terms.

section_4.title: Use of Services
section_4.respect: Respect the rights and interests of other users;
section_4.no_spam: Not distribute spam, viruses and malware;
section_4.no_illegal: Not use the Services for illegal activities;
section_4.no_abuse: Not abuse the functionality of the Services and not overload the infrastructure.

section_5.title: Intellectual Property
section_5.ownership: All rights to the Services and their content belong to the Operator or its partners.
section_5.license: Operator grants User a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Services.
section_5.user_content: By posting Content in the Services, User grants Operator a non-exclusive right to use it within the Services operation.
section_5.no_copy: Copying, modification or distribution of Services materials without written permission is prohibited.

section_6.title: Limitation of Liability
section_6.as_is: Services are provided «as is» without any warranties.
section_6.no_warranty: Operator does not guarantee uninterrupted operation of the Services and absence of errors.
section_6.technical: Temporary unavailability or failures in the Services;
section_6.data_loss: Loss of User data due to technical reasons;

section_7.title: Paid Services
section_7.payment: Some features of the Services may be paid.
section_7.price: The cost of services is indicated on the website and may be changed by the Operator.
section_7.refund: Refunds are made in accordance with applicable law and refund conditions.
section_7.subscription: With recurring payment subscriptions, charges occur automatically until subscription cancellation.

section_9.changes: Operator reserves the right to change the terms of the Agreement at any time.

section_9.continued_use: Continued use of the Services after changes means acceptance of the new terms.

section_10.title: Termination of Use
section_10.termination: User may terminate use of the Services at any time.
section_10.deletion: To delete the account, contact support service.
section_10.suspension_right: Operator reserves the right to suspend access to the Services in case of violation of the Agreement terms.

section_11.title: Applicable Law and Dispute Resolution
section_11.law: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the Russian Federation.
section_11.disputes: Disputes are resolved through negotiations, and if no agreement is reached — in court at the location of the Operator.
